items.title: Florida Sues OpenAI and Sam Altman Over Violent Incidents
items.summary: Florida has filed a first-of-its-kind lawsuit against OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman, alleging their AI models contributed to violent incidents.

items.title: Alphabet Plans to Raise $80 Billion for AI Infrastructure Buildout
items.summary: Alphabet is reportedly seeking to raise $80 billion to fund its ambitious AI infrastructure expansion, signaling massive investment in the sector.

items.title: Nvidia Targets $200B CPU Market with AI Agent PCs from Microsoft, Dell, and HP
items.summary: Nvidia is expanding its reach into the CPU market, partnering with Microsoft, Dell, and HP to power new AI agent-enabled personal computers.

items.title: OpenAI Frontier Models and Codex Now Available on AWS
items.summary: OpenAI has announced the availability of its frontier models and Codex on Amazon Web Services, expanding access for developers and enterprises.

items.title: OpenAI Details Views on AI Policy and Political Advocacy
items.summary: OpenAI has published its stance on AI policy and political advocacy, outlining its approach to shaping future regulations and public discourse.

items.title: GrepSeek: Training Search Agents for Direct Corpus Interaction
items.summary: Researchers introduce GrepSeek, a novel method for training AI search agents to directly interact with and query large text corpora more effectively.

items.title: COLLEAGUE.SKILL: Automated AI Skill Generation via Expert Knowledge Distillation
items.summary: A new paper presents COLLEAGUE.SKILL, a system for automatically generating AI skills by distilling knowledge from human experts.

items.title: OpenAI Builds 'Intelligence Age' Infrastructure in Michigan
items.summary: OpenAI is investing in building new data center infrastructure in Michigan, positioning it as a key hub for the 'Intelligence Age'.

items.title: Trust-Region Behavior Blending for On-Policy Distillation
items.summary: This research explores Trust-Region Behavior Blending, a technique for improving on-policy distillation by combining expert and student policies.

items.title: My Company Bought a $660K AI Platform and I Was Replaced, Highlighting AI Deployment Challenges
items.summary: An anecdotal account details a company's $660K AI platform purchase leading to job replacement and a critical system rollback, illustrating real-world AI implementation pitfalls.

items.title: How Google Used Gemini to Build Google I/O 2026
items.summary: Google shares insights into how its Gemini AI model was leveraged internally to develop and streamline the production of Google I/O 2026.

items.title: SwanVoice: Expressive Long-Form Zero-Shot Speech Synthesis for Monologue and Dialogue
items.summary: SwanVoice introduces a new method for highly expressive, long-form, zero-shot speech synthesis capable of generating both monologues and dialogues.

items.title: Mellum2 Technical Report Released
items.summary: The technical report for Mellum2 provides a detailed overview of the model's architecture, training, and performance benchmarks.

items.title: From Vibe Coding to Clear Thinking: What Non-Technical Builders Need in the Age of AI
items.summary: This article discusses the evolving needs of non-technical builders in the AI era, emphasizing the shift from intuitive 'vibe coding' to more structured, clear thinking.

items.title: Constraining LLMs Just Like Users
items.summary: An article explores practical methods for constraining Large Language Models to behave more predictably and align with user expectations, similar to how human users are constrained.
